estimates.note: cred ‖ pk_issuer is ≥ 1,408 bytes → ≥ 11 rate blocks; a depth-32 SHA-3 Merkle path adds 32 permutations. In-circuit Dilithium verification (also [F]) is estimated at millions of constraints in the manuscript.
